finding_results.notes: The resistance strand now carries a repeatable child and route detail before the mission, then returns to that same trunk and fruit-portrait turn in the aftermath so Owen's absence resolves as a missed physical moment rather than abstract neglect.
finding_results.summary: Specific extraction detail now counterweights the C-13 intrigue: Martha names the linen-turn route and tin badger trunk in setup, the aftermath shows the torn handle and stair injury, and Owen explicitly pictures the moment one extra set of hands would have changed.

finding_results.notes: The Penrose-to-Martha span now contains three Owen-only internal beats: bodily anti-flinch control, predictive dread about Penrose's failed denial, and shame at how fully he has learned the Hall's resume-and-swallow routine.
finding_results.summary: The breakfast cruelty scene is re-anchored inside Owen's pressured avoidance instead of reading as an external camera run; his body control, dread, and self-disgust are all present before Martha's accusation lands.

finding_results.notes: Roughened Martha's breakfast and common-room accusation beats with repetition, restart, and task/body detail while keeping her blunt practical register. Removed the cleanest list-based diagnosis of Owen so the grievance lands as pressured speech rather than a finished set piece.
finding_results.summary: Martha's confrontations now keep the same grievance but arrive with more friction, less symmetry, and a stronger sense of anger landing in real time.

pass_summaries.summary: Revised chapter 1 to strengthen Owen's interior anchoring during the Great Hall punishment and to make the resistance extraction strand concretely memorable in both setup and aftermath, while preserving the chapter's existing turn toward North Stacks C-13.
Revised the packet-cited Martha exchanges to preserve her voice while reducing polished thesis-speech and increasing pressure-shaped dialogue roughness.
